name: Colored Glass Bath Canister Blue - Threshold™
description:
Create an amazing look in your bath space with the Colored Glass Bath Canister from Threshold™. This blue bath canister is designed in a round shape with lid to help keep the contents covered. Made of colored glass, this bath canister makes a stunning addition to your bath space. Add coordinating soap pump and bath tray to create a blue-themed bath space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
